assertions.assertion: Output uses AddGrpcClient<T>() to register the typed gRPC client with the downstream endpoint address
Output chains .AddUserAccessTokenHandler() on the gRPC client registration to attach user tokens automatically
assertions.rationale: Chains .AddUserAccessTokenHandler() directly on the gRPC client registration.

assertions.assertion: Output includes or references AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() as prerequisite for user token management
assertions.rationale: Calls builder.Services.AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() before the gRPC client registration.
